nodes.name: 萨尔塔省
nodes.summary: 萨尔塔省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联20种鸟类，包括金领金刚鹦鹉、White-tipped plantcutter、Southern antpipit等20种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Pearled treerunner
nodes.summary: Pearled treerunner（Pearled treerunner，学名 Margarornis squamiger），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联13个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: LC

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pearled treerunner (Margarornis squamiger) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, Venezuela, and possibly Argentina.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The pearled treerunner (Margarornis squamiger) is a species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, Venezuela, and possibly Argentina.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: squamiger: the Andes from southern Peru's Department of Puno south into Bolivia as far as Santa Cruz Department A single sight record in northern Argentina's Salta Province leads the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to call the species hypothetical in that country. The pearled treerunner primarily inhabits montane evergreen forest and elfin forest, and also occurs locally in Polylepis woodland and secondary forest
